expectations.text: Uses ast-grep -p or ast-grep scan to search for console calls
expectations.evidence: Command: ast-grep -p 'console.$_($$$)' -l ts search-sample.ts — used ast-grep run with pattern and language flag
Found console.error('Failed to load users:', err) on line 34

expectations.text: The output demonstrates understanding of meta-variables (using $ or $$$)
expectations.evidence: Used $_ (non-capturing) for method name and $$$ (multi) for arguments

expectations.text: The output shows the matched code results
expectations.evidence: Output shows matched lines with 2 lines of context (-C 2)
